intro: Bat, Strike, Kick and Smack balls into monstrous menagerie in this retro sport themed arena FPS roguelike.
description:
Swing baseball bats, fire hockey pucks, launch bowling balls and drive exploding golf shots straight into a parade of monsters from classic 1950s creature features.

Collect upgrades, customize your loadout, chain skill shots, and fight your way back home in this fast-paced retro action shooter set in 50’s America.

Step through a mysterious cinema portal and emerge in a bizarre monster-infested dimension where everyday sporting equipment becomes your arsenal.

Features

Weaponized sporting gear
Use baseball bats, hockey sticks, golf clubs and bowling balls to launch spiked fastballs, lightning-charged pucks and explosive drives at hordes of cinematic horrors

Retro B-movie monster mayhem
Battle a monstrous menagerie inspired by classic creature features of the 1950s

Roguelite progression
Upgrade your equipment, unlock outfits and perks, and discover powerful gear combinations that change every run

Mystery behind the portal
Uncover clues about what happened during your visit to your favourite mall cinema—and how to escape the strange world beyond the screen

Multiple themed arenas
Fight across 6 B-movie-inspired environments packed with secrets, skill shots and combo opportunities

Deep upgrade system
Dozens of weapon upgrades and modifiers let you build wildly different playstyles each run

Authentic retro presentation
Pixel-art visuals with a bold 50s sci-fi aesthetic and creature-feature atmosphere
